# plugin.delivery

> AI plugin marketplace. SDK, gateway & developer tools for building function-calling plugins. OpenAPI compatible, multi-language support, Vercel edge deployment. Build chat plugins, AI tools & extensions. Primary use in cryptocurrency, DeFI, crypto trading, and blockchain analytics.

## Overview

plugin.delivery is an open-source project by x402agent. AI plugin marketplace. SDK, gateway & developer tools for building function-calling plugins. OpenAPI compatible, multi-language support, Vercel edge deployment. Build chat plugins, AI tools & extensions. Primary use in cryptocurrency, DeFI, crypto trading, and blockchain analytics.

## Repository

- URL: https://github.com/x402agent/solana-clawd
- Language: TypeScript
- License: MIT
- Author: x402agent

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome. See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.
